key_metrics: Content Creation Rate (% of users who post)
Engagement Rate (likes, comments, shares per post)

benchmarks.content_creation_rate: 1% creator, 9% contributor, 90% lurker rule — design for all three
benchmarks.engagement_rate: > 3% engagement rate on posts is strong for public accounts
benchmarks.viral_coefficient: > 1.0 means exponential growth — most apps are 0.3–0.7
benchmarks.session_length_minutes: > 8 minutes per session is strong for social feeds

best_practices: Design for the lurker majority — 90% of users consume, not create
Seed content before launch — empty feeds kill new user activation
Implement algorithmic feed ranking before scale — chronological feed degrades at volume
Notification strategy must balance re-engagement with fatigue (use frequency caps)
Moderation infrastructure before growth — bad content compounds without it
Social graph bootstrap — import contacts, suggest follows, show 'people you may know'
First-post friction reduction — make first content creation feel safe and easy
Creator tools that improve quality of top 1% will improve overall content quality
common_risks: Empty feed problem — new users see no content and leave before returning
Hate speech and harassment at scale — moderation backlog destroys brand perception
Bot and fake account proliferation inflating metrics and polluting feeds
Viral misinformation — once viral, corrections rarely reach the same audience
Creator burnout — power creators leaving causes follower churn cascades
Network effect collapse — if core community leaves, platform becomes worthless quickly
Regulatory pressure — EU DSA, CSAM detection requirements, election content rules
growth_patterns: Invite-only launch — artificial scarcity creates FOMO and quality seed community
Celebrity / influencer seeding — top creators bring their existing audiences
Cross-posting tools — let creators post to other platforms simultaneously to grow your platform
SEO on public content — user profiles, posts, and topics as long-tail landing pages
Embed / share widgets — content consumption outside the app drives new user acquisition
College campus strategy — dominate one college, then expand (Zuckerberg playbook)
viral_loops: Tag-a-friend mechanic — comment with @username is social activation
Share to Stories / Status — one-tap share creates impressions outside the platform
Public profiles indexed by search engines — SEO-driven organic acquisition
Challenge mechanic — user-initiated viral trends (ALS Ice Bucket, TikTok dances)
Leaderboard or status system — competition drives posting frequency

before_launch: Clear community guidelines and terms of service
Report and appeal flow for every piece of content
Human moderation queue before automated classifiers
at_scale: ML-assisted content classification (hate speech, NSFW, spam)
Proactive CSAM scanning (NCMEC PhotoDNA required by law in US)
Trust and safety team with clear escalation paths

recommended_integrations: Cloudinary — image and video processing, CDN, moderation filters
Stream — social feeds, activity streams, and chat infrastructure
Ably or Pusher — real-time notifications and presence
Hive Moderation — AI content moderation for NSFW and hate speech
Resend — email digests, follower notification emails
